title: Multiplex RT-qPCR  for RSV A and B Typing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"54v3v","text":"This SOP describes a multiplex RT-qPCR assay for the detection and typing of respiratory syncytial virus (RSV) into subgroups A and B, enabling simultaneous identification of both targets in a single reaction.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Reagent Use [] 1x (ul) 1 H2O 5.25 2 2x PCR Master Mix 12.5 3 RSAB1F Primer 40 uM 0.5* 4 RSAB1A Primer 5 RP-F Primer 20 uM 0.5* 6 RP-R Primer 7 RSV A-FAM Probe 10 uM 0.25 8 RSV B-HEX Probe 0.25 9 RP-TxRd 2.5 uM 0.25 10 SuperScript III RT/Platinum 0.5 * This volume refers to a pull composed of the two primers
Primers: Primer Sequence (5'-3') 1 RSAB1F TTCTTGTTAGGTGTWGGATCTGCAAT 2 RSAB1R GTTACACCTGCATTRACACTRAATTC 3 RP-F GACTTCAGCATGGCGGTGT 4 RP-R GAGCGGCTGTCTCCACAAGT
Probes: Probe Sequence (5'-3') 1 RSVA-FAM TCTACTATCCACAAACAAGGCTGTAGTC 2 RSVB-HEX TTCCAACAATCTGCTGTTCTTCTGCTGG 3 RP-TxRd TTCTGACCTGAAGGCTCTGCGCG
A B C 1 52ºC 30 min 2 95ºC 2 min 3 95ºC 15 seg 50x 4 55ºC 1 min 30 seg
creator: Albert Campoy
